2025 Immunization Champion Award Winners 
The 2025 Immunization Champion Award winners have been announced by the Association of Immunization Managers (AIM) to celebrate National Immunization Awareness Month. The Immunization Champion Award honors individuals working at the state, local, and territorial levels going above and beyond to promote or foster vaccinations in their communities, for both children and adults. To learn more about this year's awardees click here: Champion Awards - Association of Immunization Managers 
2025 Champion Award Logo 
Champion Awards 
Visit the Association of Immunization Managers (AIM) website to learn more about the awards.
